title: The Central Boards of Revenue Act, 1963
full_text: The Central Boards of Revenue Act, 1963 केन्‍द्रीय राजस्‍व बोर्ड अधिनियम,1963 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196354 Act Number: 54 Enactment Date: 1963-12-30 Act Year: 1963 Short Title: The Central Boards of Revenue Act, 1963 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय राजस्‍व बोर्ड अधिनियम,1963 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of separate Boards of Revenue for Direct Taxes and for Excise and Customs and to amend certain enactments for the purpose of conferring powers and imposing duties on the said Boards. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 01-01-1964 Notification: 1st January, 1964, vide notification No. S.O. 3606, dated 30th December 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
